title: ajax pseudonarcissus var. telamonius
intro: Ajax pseudonarcissus var. telamonius, also known as the 'Rattler' or 'Wild Rattler', is a variant of the autumn-flowering Narcissus pseudonarcissus, a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include relieving bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of Ajax pseudonarcissus var. telamonius can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it has been used in folk medicine for centuries to treat various ailments.
